scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../media-server && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:media-server && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: export NODE_ENV=production && npm run delete && npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.delete: pm2 stop ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 delete ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.reset: npm run delete && npm run start
